name: Azure Bot Service – Teams Message Handler

meta.description: Receives Bot Framework activities from Azure Bot Service, processes Teams messages, and replies via the Bot Connector REST API.

parameters.content:
## Azure Bot Service – Teams Webhook

**Before activating:**
1. Copy the **Webhook URL** from the Webhook node below.
2. In Azure Portal → Bot Service → Configuration → Messaging endpoint, paste that URL.
3. Set `BOT_APP_ID` and `BOT_APP_PASSWORD` in your Azure Bot registration.
4. Set the `BOT_APP_ID` expression on the **Verify Bot Identity** node.
5. Replace `YOUR_N8N_WEBHOOK_URL` in the Teams bot app `.env` with this URL.

**Flow:**
- Azure Bot Service → POST activity to this webhook
- Workflow extracts `activity.type`, `activity.text`, `from.name`
- For `message` activities, composes a reply and POSTs back to `serviceUrl`
- Bot Connector JWT auth is handled by Azure Bot Service; this webhook receives the raw activity

**Reference:** https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/bot-service/rest-api/bot-framework-rest-connector-api-reference#activity-object

nodes.name: Get Bot Framework Token
nodes.notes: Set BOT_APP_ID and BOT_APP_PASSWORD as n8n Variables (Settings → Variables) — never hardcode credentials
